title: KARANGA
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: KARANGA (The Karanga People)

verses.text: ANSWER: Ngano inyaya isina kuitika , asi yagadzirirwa kudzidzisa
Isu tine rungano rwa Tsuro na Gudo
MuShona akanzwa nyaya ya Tsuro na Gudo anoziva kuti Tsuro chiyi, saka anoziva kuti haina kuitika
Asi mu ENGLISH akanzwa nyaya imwe chete iyoyo yaiswa muchirungu asi zita re TSURO risina, anofunga kuti yakaitika
Chikonzero , munhu azoisa nyaya mu chirungu ahana kuchinja pakanzi TSURO achi isa RABBIT
MAZITA ahana kuiswa muchi rudzi chinenge cha translatwa bible
Nekuti kuti nzvimbo hadzina kuiswa mu mutauro we translation
Izvi zvakapa kuti vachena vaku gadzirirei chinamato chenyu chisina idi
Ivo pari kunzi SAMSON vari kuziva zvazviri kureva
Zvekuti kutozo svika ku MASOWE vanhu vanenge vachiratidzwa SAMSON
Asi zvinoratidza kuti kana ari muporofiti zvedi, Mwari anenge achiri kuda kuziviswa kuvanhu se Ngano mu SA NGANO
Chinzwai zvino reva SAMSON, ndojekesa nhau ye Vhudzi yamanga muchi vhunza
Makatarisa apo pakanzi SYMBOLISM, muno ona kuti pakanzi
KARANGA zvino taura Mwana we zuva.
Sei tichiti KALANGA zvinoreva MWANA we ZUVA
Nzvimbo yaigara Baba Johani ne imba ya MWARI yainzi RANGA
Na nhasi RANGA ndo musoro we nyaya Musangano reku SATURDAY
INI ndikati ndini MUKARANGA pamasowe ndinonzi gara pasi SATAN
Asi ndikati ndini SAMSON , ndinonzi taurai Mwari wangu
Izvi ndozvinopa kuti varungu vaseke pamunoti taka sungunuka
Ivo vanoti chatakava sunga nacho hachi fudzunuke
Ivo havaende kuma Church se zvatinoita
Kana paine anokuziva nga ati imbirewo
Pamwe sandiwo mavara acho, asi verse randiri kureva hapangashayewo mumwe chete anori ziva
Ukavhunza mupositori kuti sei muchi gera musoro anoti ,
But kana uri munhu ano nyatso funga,
Mhinduro yakadaro saka iri kureva kuti MWARI ndiye akasika munhu wose akabva aisa imba ye mweya wakaipa pa musoro pake here
Nekuti kana zviri izvo zvaraka ipira sei tinaro
BVUNZO: SAMSON aiva ne vhudzi rakaita sei?
Saka sei akanga asina Mweya wakaipa ainaro, asi akatozoita mweya wakaipa abvisa
Vese ava havana kumbobvira vagerwa musoro kubva paku berekwa kusvika pakufa
Nekuti munhubpa akasikwa na MWARI akanzi usagere vhudzi
Chikonzero ndakati Vhudzi raka fanana ne arial ye radio
Asi inobata zvinoenderana ne Station ya sarudzwa ne radio yacho
Arial haiti radio yasarudza 99.3 fm iyo yobva ya bata 96.0fm
Ukaita zvakaipa Arial yako ino bata network ye mweya uno enderana ne station yawa sarudza
Saka vhudzi rinogona kubata Mweya wakaipa kana Mweya Mutsvene, ndizvo wakasvika pane chipoko rinoti nyau nyau ku simuka iwe usati wachiona
Pakauya Baba Johani vanhu vazhinji vakanga vakubata mabasa akaipa
Isu se vana ve zuva sa SAMSON tino bata network inonzi RA
Saka MWARI akati kana munhu wanyanyo tadza unofanira kugera vhudzi
Nekuti kuti uri chengete hunge uchibata network ye zuva
Isu tinoda kufa tichienda mabve zuva,
Tino namata taka tarisa mabve zuva
Kuna isusu tinoti ZUVA ndi RA
Vanga rambe havo asi vakatangirwa ne mutauro
Uri kunzi uchene ugone kubata network ye zuva
Other wise uchaimba kuti tino famba ne zuva iwe usiri kufamba naro
Pari kutaurwa ngirozi tsvene kana mweya mutsvene unouya uri mu mbiri ye ZUVA
Ndiye akanzi RAPHAEL murapi we maronda
Saka mumutauro we hebrew weva Israel
Zvino sei IZWI pa NEVANJI risina kutiudza kuti VA ISRAEL tisu
Chikonzero PASI rose rine tsika yekuti rikaziva va ISRAEL rinoedza ne pose kunova PARADZA
Asi ndichagara ndavati imbai muchiti patino sangana vana ce ISRAEL ngati kurukure zve humambo hwedenga
Chinonzi ISRAEL kuva mu mbiri ya Mwari
Saka hamaigona futi kunzi ma ISRAEL zvizere, nekuti manga musisiri va ISRAEL mutsika
anoziva kuti uri kuti muno vhenekera nzira yangu
ndo munzwisisiro wauno fanira kuita Mwari kana ati ndini RA
Zvimwe munga rambe henyu ahasi muhombe ndi RA
BVUNZO: Mwedzi wekutanga pagore unonzi ani ku SHONA?
Hapana paucha kudza chino kupa hupenyu USINGA CHIONE ,
Uchitadza kukudza chinokupa hupenyu ZVAUNOTO ONA
Iye MWARI akati ungazo kudza ini wausingaone sei , uchitadza kukudza zvauno ona
BVUNZO: Munhu kana ukasanwa mvura kwe tomboti 60 days , chi chinoitika???
Chiri kukupa hupenyu imvura here kana kuti ndi MWARI
Ndiye wawa regedza kunwa here kana kuti waregera kunwa mvura?
Zvizivei kuti Mvura ndi Mwari pa anenge ava Mvura
Saka zvizivei next time pamunoriona kudenga kuti
Ndi MWARI pa anenge ava ZUVA
Saka kuti utende MWARI kana paine akuitira zvakanaka, unotomutenda nekutenda munhu wacho akuitira
Mwari ahana basa nazvo kuti wazomutenda iye pa muteuro
Ari kuti nditende ndiri zvandanga ndiri pandakupa
Saka kana Mwari atipa hupenyu ari mvura, tinomu tenda ari mvura

Nekuti pauchati wapihwa mota ne munhu , obva wango vhurumutsa mota uchienda, usina kuti THANK YOU, woti ndiri kumhanya nhasi , ndiri kuda kuno bata nguva dzose dze minamato ndichitenda Mwari ne Mota ya andipa
Nyangwe uka bata nguva dzose anoti, hauna kunditenda
Unoto fanira kudzokera kune akupa mota oti thank you, wadaro , Mwari ozoti watondi tenda pawatenda akupa
Nekuti une zvimwe kare zvekuno tenda Mwari pamunamato
Dzidziso iyi inoisa MWARI pedyo uye pose
Kwete kuti Mwari ave ku MAKORE
Asi mumunhu wose nemu zvinhu zvose
BVUBZO:Mwana akapihwa chinhu akasa OMBERA anoitwa sei?
Swahili ne SHONA zvakabva padzinde RIMWE CHETE
Vese nana KIKUYU yeku kenya ikoko tino shandisa mavara mazhinji aka fanana
Zvimwe chete ne NDEBELE, zvinozongo siyana mbichana matauriro nekuti takazono gara kwakasiyana
Asi takabva mu imba imwe chete
Zvekuti Tateguru akanovamba ma NDEBELE kana kuti NGUNI pamwe aiva mukoma kana muninina we Akanovamba rudzi rwema SHONA kana ma SWAHILI
Kana kunamata kuchinzi OMBE kana OMBA mu SWAHILI, zvareva kuti neku SHONA , zvinogona kureva Zvimwe chete
